4.2		1	-1	-1			False	False	False	F2A3B4C5D6E7F89	 6.0.4.3	en-US	.	,	.,3ZZZ	129600			False	0	Carrier Healthcare	Syracuse		/c	/n	/t	B2C3D4E5-F6A7-8901-BCDE-F12345678901	5.0
